MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Gruber and Gruber Properties is present. Represented by, David Gruber.
Attorney, David Wasserman is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mary Nethercutt is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Natalie Evans.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of September 24, 2012 is vacated.
